close_reason: Updated batching to use state.sequencer directly
description:
Update batching.ex to use state.sequencer instead of state.transaction_system_layout.sequencer.

## Current Code

```elixir
# In batching.ex
sequencer = state.transaction_system_layout.sequencer
```

## New Code

```elixir
# In batching.ex
sequencer = state.sequencer
```

## Simple Change

This is a straightforward field access update. Search for all uses of
`transaction_system_layout.sequencer` in batching.ex and replace with
`state.sequencer`.

## Testing

Existing tests should pass after State is updated with sequencer field.
title: Batching: Use state.sequencer directly
